confirmDelete.title: Cima igumbi ngonaphakade?
confirmDelete.message: Oku kuza kuvala intlanganiso yabo bonke abathathi-nxaxheba kwaye kucime yonke idatha.

enterprise.label: Useto lweShishini
enterprise.sub: Gemini Isitshixo, Quest Flow, iithegi, CRM

call.waitingSubtitle: Silinde ukuba umntu othetha nathi aphendule...
call.roomFull: 🚫 Igumbi lizele - sele kukho abantu ababini ababandakanyekayo kulo

coach.title: Umncedisi we-AI: Indlela yokuphendula
coach.promptPlaceholder: Buza nantoni na - malunga nengxoxo okanye nawuphi na umbuzo wakho

tonePrompts.scientific: Phendula njengososayensi, unamakhonkco ophando okanye idatha.
tonePrompts.empathic: Phendula ngovelwano, uqonde iimvakalelo zomnye umntu.

roomActions.deleteSub: Vala intlanganiso uze ucime yonke idatha

billing.quotaExhaustedSub: I-bot yoguqulelo imisiwe. Nceda uthenge imizuzu eyongezelelweyo.
billing.lowBalanceSub: Thenga imizuzu eyongezelelweyo ukuze incoko yakho iqhubeke.
billing.paywallNoSub: Ukuze udale igumbi, nceda ubhalisele isicwangciso
billing.paywallLowBalance: Akukho mizuzu iseleyo kwibhalansi yakho - bhalisela isicwangciso okanye uthenge okungakumbi

changePwd.title: Tshintsha iphasiwedi
changePwd.errNoPassword: Utshintsho lwegama eligqithisiweyo alufumaneki kule akhawunti (ukungena ngemvume kuGoogle).

sip.title: Ucingo lwe-SIP
sip.subtitle: Ukuseta ii-trunks zeefowuni ezingenayo neziphumayo

incoming.heading: Iifowuni ze-SIP ezingenayo
incoming.lead: Idilesi ye-SIP eyahlukileyo yokuthumela iifowuni zangaphandle ezivela kumboneleli wakho ukuya kwinkqubo yeVibeVox.
incoming.emptyHint: Yenza i-SIP URI eyahlukileyo + ukungena/iphasiwedi ukuze abathengi bakwazi ukukufowunela kuyo nayiphi na ifowuni, kwaye iVibeVox iya kuguqulela ilizwi lakho ngokuzenzekelayo ngexesha langempela.
incoming.activeHint: Umguquleli weBridge umamela igumbi. Yonke ifowuni iguqulelwa ngexesha langempela.
incoming.pausedHint: Yenza kusebenze ulwamkelo ukuze iVibeVox iqalise ukuguqulela iifowuni ezingenayo.

outbound.heading: Umnxeba ophumayo
outbound.lead: Fowunela inombolo yefowuni usebenzisa i-web interface kwaye iVibeVox iya kuyiguqulela ngokuzenzekelayo incoko yakho ngexesha langempela.
outbound.noTrunkHint: Gcwalisa ifomu ethi "Isiqu esitsha se-SIP" phezulu kwiphepha - iVibeVox iza kusebenzisa umboneleli wakho we-SIP (iZadarma, i-OnlinePBX, njl.njl.) kwiifowuni eziphumayo.
outbound.configureFirst: Okokuqala, seta itrunk ye-SIP ephumayo (ifomu engasentla)
outbound.invalidNumber: Nceda ufake inombolo echanekileyo kwifomathi yamazwe ngamazwe (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Indlela yokuseta
howTo.step1: Fumana iziqinisekiso ze-SIP trunk kumboneleli wakho (iZadarma, i-OnlinePBX, i-Asterisk).
howTo.step3: I-VibeVox iza kuyila ngokuzenzekelayo i-trunk ye-SIP ephumayo kwi-LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Kuza kungekudala: I-SIP URI engenayo yokudlulisela umnxeba wangaphandle.

tenantOnly.title: Iitranki ze-SIP zenziwe kwinqanaba lomqeshi
tenantOnly.hint1: Ifowuni ye-SIP ayinakumiselwa phantsi kweakhawunti ye-superadmin (ngaphandle kwe-UUID yomqeshi).
tenantOnly.hint2: Ngena njengomsebenzisi oqhelekileyo one-tenantId yakhe ukuze wenze i-trunk.

sip.connected: Isiqu se-SIP sigciniwe kwaye sihambelana ne-LiveKit

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Uqwalaselo luza kucinywa. Iifowuni eziphumayo ziya kuma ude uphinde wenze i-trunk.
danger.deleteInboundHint: Umthetho we-LiveKit ongenayo kunye nowokuthunyelwa kwe-dispatch uza kususwa. Iifowuni ezingenayo azisayi kwamkelwa.
danger.reissueHint: Phinda ukhuphe igama lokungena kunye negama lokugqitha ledilesi ye-SIP. Ulwazi oludala alusayi kusebenza.

outbound2.rateInfo: Ixabiso ngomzuzu ngamnye lomnxeba ophumayo limiselwa ngumboneleli wakho we-SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Esi senzo asinakuguqulwa. Nje ukuba sicinywe, iifowuni eziphumayo ziya kuma de kwenziwe itrunk entsha.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Esi senzo asinakuguqulwa. Umgaqo we-trunk engenayo kunye nowokuthunyelwa kwi-LiveKit Cloud uza kucinywa.

page.title: Useto lweShishini
page.subtitle: Zonke ii-integration, izitshixo, kunye neeparameter ze-AI zeakhawunti yakho
page.upsellBody: Apha ungamisela: isitshixo seGemini API sobuqu, isiseko solwazi kunye noqhagamshelwano, ukuhlanganiswa neQuest Flow + Telegram bot, kunye nokudibanisa neChatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Google Gemini API Isitshixo
gemini.lead: Isitshixo somntu siqu esivela kwiAI Studio. Esi sithatha indawo yesitshixo sehlabathi kuzo zonke iifowuni zeGemini kwiakhawunti yakho.
gemini.leadSuffix: . Isetyenziswe endaweni yeyomhlaba wonke kuzo zonke iifowuni zeGemini kwiakhawunti yakho.
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Imisebenzi ye-AI iya kusebenzisa isitshixo esabelwana ngaso seVibeVox (ukuba sicwangcisiwe).

telegram.heading: Telegram-bot yezaziso
telegram.lead: Yenza i-bot nge@BotFather uze ufake ithokheni yayo. Nabani na othumela le bot umyalezo othi /start uya kufumana izaziso: abathengi abatsha, iithegi, iimpazamo zokudibanisa. Ungabhalisa abasebenzi abaninzi okanye wongeze i-bot kwiqela okanye kwitshaneli—izaziso ziya kuthunyelwa kuye wonke umntu ngokuzenzekelayo.
telegram.leadAfterStart: , iza kufumana izaziso malunga nabathengi abatsha, iithegi, kunye neempazamo zokudibanisa. Ungabhalisa abasebenzi abaninzi okanye wongeze i-bot kwiqela okanye kwitshaneli—wonke umntu uza kufumana isaziso ngokuzenzekelayo.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ I-Bot @{{username}} igciniwe. Imibuliso ithunyelwe kubabhalisi be-{{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ I-Bot @{{username}} igciniwe. Nabani na oyithumelayo umyalezo /start uya kufumana izaziso.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Umyalezo uthunyelwe kubamkeli be-{{count}}. Nceda ujonge Telegram.
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Ababhalisile nabo baza kususwa - izaziso azisayi kuza.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Iposi yamva nje: ithunyelwe {{sent}} evela ku {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Gcina kwaye uqinisekise isitshixo se-API kuqala — ukuveliswa komfanekiso kuyayidinga.
imageModel.hint: I-Nano Banana yenza ukuveliswa, ukuhlela kunye nokwakhiwa. I-Imagen ivelisa kuphela ukusuka ekuqaleni.

prompt.heading: Iingcebiso
prompt.subtitle: Isikhokelo kunye nolwazi olusisiseko malunga nokubhalwa kwerekhodi kumagumbi evidiyo kuphela
prompt.appendNote: Ungongeza eyakho imithetho - iya kudityaniswa nemithetho eqhelekileyo.
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - xa ucofa umyalezo kwincoko uze ukhethe ithoni
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Isetyenziswa xa ucofa umyalezo kwincoko yegumbi levidiyo uze ukhethe ithoni
prompt.defaultSummary: Oko kusetyenziswa yi-AI ngokuzenzekelayo (ukuba intsimi yakho ayinanto) - cofa ukuze ubone
prompt.extendNoteText: ngemithetho/isitayile/isigama sabo - baya kudityaniswa neprompt esimiselweyo esingentla kunye nesiseko solwazi.
prompt.kbHeading: Isiseko soLwazi — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Layisha uxwebhu—ikhathalogu, imibuzo ebuzwa rhoqo, uluhlu lwamaxabiso, imigaqo, okanye izinto ezibonisa ulwazi. Umxholo uhlalutywa kwiseva (i-Word/Excel/CSV → umbhalo) kwaye udityaniswe yi-AI xa ubhala imiyalezo kumagumbi evidiyo. Umda: Ifayile ye-50 MB / oonobumba abangama-500,000 kwisiseko sedatha.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Onke amaxwebhu alayishiweyo aya kunyamalala. Esi senzo asinakurhoxiswa.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Kwincoko yeGumbi leShishini, ungagxininisa nawuphi na umyalezo kwaye ucele i-AI ukuba iwuchaze ngethoni ekhethiweyo.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: isebenzisa isilumkiso sakho esivela kwicandelo elingasentla.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Iimpendulo ze-AI kubathengi ngeTelegram bots kunye neInbound API
questFlow.warning: Ukuba intsimi ayinanto, kusetyenziswa prompt yeVibeVox ngokubanzi.
questFlow.headerLead: Incoko ye-AI nomthengi ngamnye ngabanye ngeTelegram-bot eqhagamshelwe kwiQuest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Isitshixo ngasinye siyimfihlo oyifaka kwibhloko yeQuest Flow HTTP yetsheyini. I-VibeVox iyisebenzisa ukuchonga iakhawunti yakho. Ungenza izitshixo ezininzi zetsheyini ezahlukeneyo.
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Gcina isitshixo - siboniswa kube kanye kuphela
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Quest Flow iya kuyeka ukusebenza kuyo.
questFlow.promptLead1: Imisela INDLELA i-AI enxibelelana ngayo nabathengi ngokusebenzisa Quest Flow: ithoni, isitayile, into ekufuneka ichongwe.
questFlow.promptLead3: — iya kudityaniswa neprompt esisisiseko kunye nolwazi.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Oko kusetyenziswa yi-AI ngokuzenzekelayo (ukuba intsimi yakho ayinanto) - cofa ukuze ubone
questFlow.kbLead1: Amaxwebhu – ikhathalogu yenkonzo, uluhlu lwamaxabiso, FAQ. Layisha TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — i-AI ayiyi kuba neenkcukacha zenkampani; iya kuphendula kuphela ngokusekelwe kulwazi ngokubanzi. Esi siseko
questFlow.kbLead3: Ukusuka kwicandelo elithi "Iingcebiso"—lokuguqulela ividiyo. Umda: Ifayile ye-50 MB / oonobumba abangama-500,000 kwisiseko sedatha.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Quest Flow Knowledge Base siza kucocwa. Esi senzo asinakurhoxiswa.
questFlow.tagsLead: I-AI inika abathengi la mathegi ukuba ibona ukufana kwincoko. Amathegi aboniswa kwikhadi legumbi lomthengi aze adluliselwe kwiCRM (iCandelo 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Isitshixo siza kucinywa ngonaphakade. I-Quest Flow ayisayi kuphinda isebenze ngaso — kuya kufuneka wenze isitshixo esitsha uze usibuyisele endaweni yaso kwi-flow.

chatwoot.heading: CRM (Chatwoot) Ukuhlanganiswa
chatwoot.subtitle: Thumela ngokuzenzekelayo imbali yefowuni kunye neethegi kwiChatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Idlulisela imbali yencoko kunye neethegi zemfuno zabathengi kwiChatwoot CRM
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Ithokheni yokufikelela kwi-Agent (evela kwiProfayili → Ithokheni yokufikelela)
chatwoot.successSaved: Igciniwe. Ngoku cofa ku "Vavanya uQhagamshelo" ukuze ujonge.
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Incoko enenqaku labucala = imbali epheleleyo yencoko
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Ithunyelwe xa ucofa ngesandla u-"Thumela kwiCRM" kwincoko yegumbi. Ukuthumela ngokuzenzekelayo xa ufumanisa i-tag luphawu olulandelayo.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Esi senzo asinakurhoxiswa. Isicatshulwa kunye nemidiya eqhotyoshelweyo ziya kucinywa.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Ifayile ebonakalayo nayo iya kucinywa kwiseva.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Amagumbi okuncokola luphawu lweShishini. Phucula isicwangciso sakho kwicandelo elithi "Amaxabiso".

lobby.title: Ukujoyina intlanganiso yevidiyo
lobby.subtitle: Ifowuni yevidiyo enoguqulelo lwe-AI ngaxeshanye
lobby.languageHint: Uza kuva uze ubone imibhalo engezantsi evela kumntu othetha naye ngolo lwimi.
lobby.shareHint: Kopisha uze uthumele kumntu othetha naye ukuze ameme intlanganiso.
lobby.audioConsent: , kwaye ikwavuma ukuba isandi sicutshungulwe ukuze siguqulelwe.
lobby.roomFullMsg: Sele kukho umntu othatha inxaxheba kwintlanganiso. Nxibelelana nomdali wentlanganiso okanye ucele entsha.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ Ikhonkco likopishiwe. Lithumele kumntu oqhagamshelana naye ngeTelegram / WhatsApp / Email. Ungalivala iphepha ngoku—ikhonkco lihlala lisebenza.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Ukuze udale igumbi, nceda ubhalisele isicwangciso
paywall.titleLowBalance: Akukho mizuzu iseleyo kwibhalansi yakho - bhalisela isicwangciso okanye uthenge okungakumbi
paywall.subtitle: Khetha isicwangciso okanye uthenge imizuzu engaphezulu - hlawula ngeStripe, buyisela imali yakho ngoko nangoko apha.
paywall.topupNote: Imizuzu iya kongezwa kwibhalansi yakho emva nje kwentlawulo.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Awunalo ubhaliso olusebenzayo. Plus iya kongezwa ekuthengeni kwakho nge-€19/ngenyanga—imizuzu engama-60 ifakiwe kwisicwangciso sakho, ngoko ke akukho ntlawulo yongezelelweyo.
paywall.stripeNote: Iintlawulo zikhuselwe yiStripe. Imizuzu ifakwa ngokuzenzekelayo emva kwentlawulo.

billingPage.title: Iirhafu kunye nentlawulo
billingPage.subtitle: Zonke iimpawu zeVibeVox — khetha isicwangciso esifanela isantya sakho somsebenzi.
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Rhoxisa ukuhlaziya ngokuzenzekelayo. Ubhaliso lwakho luya kuhlala lusebenza kude kube sekupheleni kwexesha langoku.
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Intlawulo elandelayo iya kwenzeka ekupheleni kwexesha langoku.
billingPage.promoHint: Isaphulelo siza kusetyenziswa ngokuzenzekelayo xa ubhalisela isicwangciso okanye uthenga imizuzu eyongezelelweyo.
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: Imizuzu edlulile kwixesha elidlulileyo. Isetyenziswa kuqala.
billingPage.topupHelp: Isilayidi sokuthenga esongezelelweyo. Sifumaneka ngobhaliso olusebenzayo.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Kwingxoxo zabucala kunye nabantu abasebenza ngokuzimela
billingPage.faqA1: Imizuzu engasetyenziswanga idlulela kwinyanga elandelayo. Iphelelwa yinyanga yesithathu.
billingPage.faqQ2: Ndingarhoxisa ubhaliso lwam nangaliphi na ixesha?
billingPage.faqA2: Ewe. Ungarhoxisa kwiakhawunti yakho yobuqu ngokucofa kube kanye. Ixesha elisele lihlawulwe liza kuqhubeka lide liphele.
billingPage.faqA3: I-AI stack epheleleyo: amakhadi abathengi anokwaziwa ngokuzenzekelayo, Telegram-authorization, Izikhokelo zobuqu ze-AI, Google Calendar, ukuphawulwa kweemfuno ezikrelekrele, ukuthunyelwa kweCRM ngaphandle, ukuhlanganiswa nequestflow.pro, kunye nethebhu yomlawuli eyahlukileyo.
billingPage.faqA4: Nayiphi na i-RFC ehambelanayo: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, njl. I-VibeVox idala i-trunk ephumayo ngokuzenzekelayo.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 ngomzuzu. Ukusuka kwimizuzu engama-60 ukuya kwiiyure ezili-10. Inikwa ikhredithi ngoko nangoko emva kwentlawulo.
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Ubhaliso luya kuhlala lusebenza kude kube ngu-{{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Imizuzu yerhafu iyafumaneka kude kube ngulo mhla; imizuzu eyongezelelweyo inokuthengwa.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Emva koko, ubhaliso luza kuvala ngokuzenzekelayo.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Ukuhlaziya ngokuzenzekelayo kurhoxisiwe · ubhaliso luza kuvala {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Imizuzu yesicwangciso sakho isebenza kude kube ngulo mhla; ungathenga eminye eyongezelelweyo. Cofa ku "Qhubeka" ukuba utshintsha ingqondo yakho.
billingPage.languagesLead: Uluhlu olupheleleyo lweelwimi ezixhaswa kukuguqulela ngaxeshanye ngexesha langempela. Ukuchonga ulwimi oluvela ngokuzenzekelayo—umthathi-nxaxheba ngamnye ukhetha ulwimi lwakhe lwenkobe.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Zama indlela eyahlukileyo yokupela—umzekelo, ngesiNgesi okanye ngoonobumba basekuhlaleni. Ukuba ulwimi alukho ngokuqinisekileyo, sazise, kwaye siza kongeza.

common.passwordRepeatPlaceholder: Nceda ufake igama lakho lokugqitha kwakhona

register.title: Dala i-akhawunti
register.subtitle: Ubhaliso lwasimahla kwiVibeVox
register.passwordTooShort: Iphasiwedi kufuneka ibe nobude obuziimpawu ezisi-8 ubuncinane
register.emailExists: Umsebenzisi onayo le imeyile sele ebhalisiwe.

forgot.title: Ukufunyanwa kwegama eligqithisiweyo
forgot.subtitle: Faka i-imeyile yakho kwaye siza kukuthumelela ikhonkco lokubuyisela kwimeko yesiqhelo.
forgot.successHint: Jonga i-imeyile yakho ukuba ayiboni i-imeyile yakho. Ukuba awuyiboni i-imeyile, jonga ifolda yakho ye-spam.

reset.title: Iphasiwedi entsha
reset.subtitle: Khetha igama lokugqitha elitsha lokungena.
reset.successHint: Ngoku ungangena ngemvume ngephasiwedi yakho entsha.
reset.invalidLink: Ikhonkco alisebenzi okanye liphelelwe lixesha. Cela ukuseta kwakhona igama lokugqitha.

seo.title: I-VibeVox — Inguqulelo ye-AI yexesha langempela yeefowuni zevidiyo kunye ne-SIP
seo.description: I-VibeVox liqonga lokuguqulela ilizwi elisebenza ngaxeshanye elisebenzisa i-AI elixhasa iilwimi ezingaphezu kwe-100. Iifowuni zevidiyo, umnxeba we-SIP, incoko yabathengi, kunye nohlalutyo lwencoko olusebenzisa i-AI ziyafumaneka.
seo.keywords: Inguqulelo ye-AI, inguqulelo ngaxeshanye, iifowuni zevidiyo eziguqulela, i-SIP telephony, umguquleli welizwi

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: I-VibeVox ngumguquleli we-AI osebenza ngaxeshanye kwiifowuni zelizwi nezevidiyo ngeelwimi ezili-108. I-WebRTC kunye ne-SIP telephony, umncedisi welizwi, kunye nomsebenzi wokuguqulela ngexesha langempela kuyo nayiphi na isixhobo.
pwaInstall.installCta: Yongeza iVibeVox kwisikrini sakho sasekhaya—iifowuni ezinenguqulelo, i-SIP, kunye nomncedisi we-AI ngokuthepha kanye. Isebenza njenge-app yemveli.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Yiya kwisikrini sasekhaya - qalisa ngokucofa kube kanye

partner.title: Inkqubo yamaqabane
partner.subtitle: Yabelana ngekhonkco lakho kwaye ufumane imali
partner.termsEmpty: Imigaqo yenkqubo ayikamiswa. Nceda uqhagamshelane noSuperAdmin.
